productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Casual Black Shoe
description: Composition:The shoe has a rubber sole and synthetic upper PU. Shoe care:Use a soft clean cloth to wipe away dust. Do not machine wash. Fitting:Regular.These unique numero uno sneakers in black with sturdy white soles, black and white striped cushioning, bold stitch detailing and minimalist red highlights create an impact of their own. A perfect addition to your wardrobe, these sneakers elevate any casual outfit and give it a real trendy feel. Wear them confidently with your jeans the next time you go out with friends and enjoy the attention.
